mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content_json, version, share_token, share_enabled, shared_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM resume_documents WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, title, content_json, version, share_token, share_enabled, shared_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM resume_documents WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT id, title, content_json, version, share_token, share_enabled, shared_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM resume_documents WHERE share_token = #{shareToken} AND share_enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_documents SET title = #{title}, content_json = #{contentJson}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE resume_documents SET share_token = #{shareToken}, share_enabled = 1, shared_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE resume_documents SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
